title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.35.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image) | `v5.34.3` -> `v5.35.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.35.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.35.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.34.3/v5.35.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.34.3/v5.35.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.35.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.35.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.34.3...v5.35.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.57.1, c/image to v5.34.0, then to v5.35.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2700](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2700)

-   Update dependency containers/automation_images to v20250131 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2703](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2703)

-   use new ReflinkOrCopy() from c/storage by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2714](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2714)

### ℹ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):
